description: NLP pipeline output for a conference talk transcript. Formalizes the JSON shape produced by the ionosphere NLP pipeline so panproto can use it as a lens source schema. Not published to PDS.

talkRkey.description: The rkey of the tv.ionosphere.talk record this annotation set covers.

sentences.description: Sentence-boundary spans detected in the transcript text.

paragraphs.description: Paragraph-boundary spans detected in the transcript text.

entities.description: Named entities detected in the transcript text.

topicBreaks.description: Byte positions where a topic shift was detected.

metadata.description: Provenance and configuration metadata for this annotation run.

nlpSentence.description: A sentence span identified by the NLP pipeline.

byteStart.description: Inclusive start byte offset into the transcript text.

byteEnd.description: Exclusive end byte offset into the transcript text.

nlpParagraph.description: A paragraph span identified by the NLP pipeline.

byteStart.description: Inclusive start byte offset into the transcript text.

byteEnd.description: Exclusive end byte offset into the transcript text.

nlpEntity.description: A named entity span identified by the NLP pipeline.

byteStart.description: Inclusive start byte offset into the transcript text.

byteEnd.description: Exclusive end byte offset into the transcript text.

label.description: Surface text of the named entity (e.g. 'Matt').

nerType.description: NER category label (e.g. PERSON, ORG, GPE).

conceptUri.description: AT URI of a canonical concept record for this entity, if resolved.

nlpTopicBreak.description: A position in the transcript text where the NLP pipeline detected a topic shift.

byteStart.description: Byte offset at which the topic shift begins.

nlpMetadata.description: Provenance and configuration metadata for an NLP annotation run.

tool.description: Name and version of the NLP tool used (e.g. 'spacy/en_core_web_sm').

pauseThresholdMs.description: Silence duration in milliseconds used to delimit paragraphs.

proximityWords.description: Word-window radius used when linking entity mentions to concepts.
